hero.title: Ibocode Blog: Scanning, Printing & POS Insights
hero.description: Practical insights for B2B buyers in barcode scanning, thermal printing, and POS. Read about market shifts, QC tactics, and compliance checklists.

posts.title: 1D vs 2D Scan Engines: Which Barcode Scanner Do You Need?
posts.excerpt: From UPC barcodes to QR codes on phone screens, 2D imagers are becoming the default. Here is what wholesalers should know before sourcing.

posts.title: Reducing Return Rates: Why Scan Engine Quality Matters
posts.excerpt: Misreads and dead units drive returns. Learn how imager selection, alignment, and 100% aging testing protect your margins.

posts.title: CE, RoHS & FCC: Compliance Checklist for POS & Scanner Imports
posts.excerpt: Navigating EU and US compliance can be tricky. We break down the documentation you need before importing barcode and POS equipment.

posts.title: Retail Box vs Bulk Export: Packaging for Scanners & Printers
posts.excerpt: Retail boxes need to sell. Export cartons need to survive shipping. How to choose the right packaging strategy for your channel.

posts.title: Wireless 2D Scanners and Mobile Payment Codes
posts.excerpt: Wireless 2D imagers that read mobile payment screens are reshaping retail checkout. See what this means for your product line.

posts.title: How to Choose the Right Scanner OEM Partner in China
posts.excerpt: Beyond the price tag: assessing communication, IP protection, and quality control capabilities for long-term supply stability.
